title: Cross‐national contexts and social inequality in public schools, families and caring institutions
abstract: Click to increase image sizeClick to decrease image size Notes 1. We realize that the notion of ‘globalization’ is contested analytical terrain. Owing to space limitations, we will confine our review of section II to the paper on Eastern Europe.
